files.patch:
@@ -38,1 +38,1 @@ - * `==` in place of `.equals()` equality when comparing keys (and values). + * {@code == } in place of {@code }.equals()} equality when comparing keys (and values). @@ -49,1 +49,1 @@ - * designed for use only in the rare cases wherein `==` semantics are required. + * designed for use only in the rare cases wherein {@code == } semantics are required. @@ -60,1 +60,1 @@ - *
